Organizer - Class in com.example.eventlottery
This class models an organizer account stored in Firestore at organizers/{organizerId}.
Organizer() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
No-arg constructor; sets role to organizer.
Organizer(String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Constructs an organizer with only a display label; other name fields empty.
Organizer(String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.Organizer
Constructs an organizer with full name and contact fields.
OrganizerDashboardFragment - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Organizer dashboard: lists events where organizerId == deviceId.
OrganizerDashboardFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerDashboardFragment
 
OrganizerEventAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlottery
RecyclerView adapter for organizer dashboard event cards.
OrganizerEventAdapter() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerEventAdapter
 
OrganizerInviteEntrantActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Lets an organizer search the users collection by name, phone, or email and invite specific entrants to a private event's waiting list (US 02.01.03, 01.05.06).
OrganizerInviteEntrantActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerInviteEntrantActivity
 
OrganizerNavigationFragment - Class in com.example.eventlottery
 
OrganizerNavigationFragment() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerNavigationFragment
 
OrganizerNotificationLogActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Shows all notifications sent (automatically by lottery/invite, or manually) for a specific event.
OrganizerNotificationLogActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerNotificationLogActivity
 
OrganizerProfileActivity - Class in com.example.eventlottery
Edit organizer profile (firstName, lastName, email, phone) in Firestore organizers/{deviceId}.
OrganizerProfileActivity() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlottery.OrganizerProfileActivity
